GeoPackage

GeoPackage Project Documentation

This project contains Geomatics engineering data structures (Point, Line) as part of the Python package development assignment.

Weekly Progress Report

This week, the following tasks were completed towards developing a professional Python package:

  • Geometry Classes: Implemented Point and Line classes using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles to handle spatial data.

  • Data Parsing: Developed a parser module to read geometry data from specific .txt formats and convert them into Python objects.

  • Documentation with Sphinx: Integrated Sphinx into the project and configured the autodoc extension to generate documentation from docstrings.

  • Theme Exploration: Evaluated multiple Sphinx themes (including ‘alabaster’ and ‘sphinx_rtd_theme’) as requested, choosing the ‘sphinx_rtd_theme’ for its professional layout.

  • Git Version Control: Set up the project repository on GitHub and maintained a consistent commit history throughout the development process.

Modules

class geo_package.geometry.Line(name)

Bases: object

Çizgi geometrisi sınıfı.

add_point(point_obj)
class geo_package.geometry.Point(x, y, label=None)

Bases: object

Nokta geometrisi sınıfı.

geo_package.parser.read_geometry_file(file_path)

Dosyadan geometri verilerini okur.
